role: Implement FastAPI backend per Backend_TRD using best-in-class Python tooling

tools.FastAPI_0_110_plus: Best Python API framework 2025-2026 — async, type-safe, auto-docs, OpenAPI generation

orm_and_database.description: Type-safe database access with migration support

tools.SQLAlchemy_2_0: New typed query style, async support via asyncpg
tools.SQLModel: Alternative — combines SQLAlchemy + Pydantic (by FastAPI creator), simpler for CRUD
tools.Alembic: The only serious choice for SQLAlchemy migrations — auto-generate from models
tools.asyncpg: Async PostgreSQL driver for maximum performance

tools.Pydantic_v2: Core of FastAPI — all modeling, 5-50x faster than v1
tools.pydantic_settings: Environment variable management with type validation

tools.FastAPI_Users: Production-grade auth with JWT, OAuth2, password hashing

tools.ARQ: Lightweight async task queue alternative (simpler, fewer dependencies)

tools.Redis: Primary cache, session store, rate limiting backend

tools.structlog: Structured logging with JSON output, processor pipeline — production-grade

tools.Ruff: Replaces flake8, isort, black, pyupgrade — blazingly fast, single tool (by Astral)

tools.uv: 10-100x faster than pip — the new standard (2025-2026) by Astral (Ruff creators)
tools.uv_lock: Reproducible dependency locking committed to Git

ai_service_integration.description: AI/ML service integration for content processing

tools.pgvector: PostgreSQL vector extension for duplicate detection via embeddings

tools.slowapi: Rate limiting middleware for FastAPI (based on limits)

architecture.pattern: Clean Architecture / Hexagonal: routers → services → repositories → models
architecture.method: Async-first, Dependency Injection via FastAPI Depends(), Repository pattern
